title: lastrea chaseana
intro: Lastrea chaseana, also known as the Chase's Lady fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Athyriaceae. It is native to the Himalayan region and is prized for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, due to its health benefits, which include reducing inflammation and improving immune function. The herbal preparations of Lastrea chaseana include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made by steeping the dried fronds in hot water or using a solvent to extract its medicinal compounds.
